posts.text:
BREAKING: President Trump says he would be "honored" to meet Iranian Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei "if it was to make a deal."

Such a meeting would mark the first ever face-to-face meeting between a sitting US President and an Iranian Supreme Leader.
posts.author: KobeissiLetter
